test_strategy_covers_all_types.details: Unit (36), Integration (10), E2E (N/A -- inline orchestrator logic). Security via fail-open tests. Performance via token budget and latency tests.

test_cases_for_all_requirements.details: 14/14 ACs covered. 7/7 FRs covered. 3/3 NFRs covered.

traceability_matrix_complete.details: 100% requirement coverage. Every FR, AC, and NFR mapped to at least one test case.

coverage_targets_defined.details: >=80% unit coverage (Article II standard tier). 100% critical paths (fail-open, extraction, compliance).

test_data_strategy_documented.details: Boundary values (11 entries), invalid inputs (14 entries), maximum-size inputs (5 entries).

critical_paths_identified.details: Fail-open (NFR-001), protocol extraction (FR-002), compliance detection (FR-006), violation escalation (FR-007).
